title: Global Structured Finance Rating Criteria
description: Overarching framework for S&P's approach to rating structured finance transactions globally, including key analytical principles, credit enhancement, and structural features.

title: European RMBS Methodology and Assumptions
description: Criteria for rating European residential mortgage-backed securities, covering default frequency, loss severity, cash flow analysis, and country-specific mortgage market assumptions.

title: European CMBS Methodology and Assumptions
description: Methodology for rating European commercial mortgage-backed securities, including property valuation, loan-level analysis, and market value decline assumptions.

title: Global Methodology for Rating CLOs
description: Global criteria for rating CLOs, covering credit analysis of leveraged loan portfolios, recovery rates, CDO Evaluator model, and structural features of CLO transactions.

title: Consumer ABS Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for rating asset-backed securities backed by consumer receivables including personal loans, credit cards, and other unsecured consumer debt.

title: Auto Loan and Lease ABS Methodology
description: Rating methodology for auto loan and lease ABS, including analysis of obligor credit quality, residual value risk, historical loss performance, and recovery expectations.

title: Counterparty Risk Framework: Methodology and Assumptions
description: Framework for assessing counterparty risk in structured finance transactions, including bank account providers, swap counterparties, and other transaction participants.

title: Asset Isolation and Special-Purpose Entity Criteria
description: Criteria for evaluating asset isolation and bankruptcy remoteness of SPEs in structured finance, covering true sale opinions, consolidation risk, and legal structure requirements.

title: Assessing Pools of Residual Loans - Europe Supplement
description: Supplementary criteria for assessing pools of residual/reperforming loans in European securitisations, including haircuts, re-default assumptions, and cure rate analysis.

title: Structured Finance: Interest Rate Stresses
description: Interest rate stress assumptions used across S&P's structured finance ratings, including upward and downward stress scenarios for various currencies and tenors.

title: Structured Finance Temporary Interest Rate Stresses
description: Temporary adjustments to standard interest rate stress assumptions reflecting current market conditions and central bank policy expectations.

title: SME CLO Rating Methodology
description: Methodology for rating CLOs and ABS backed by SME loan portfolios, covering credit quality assessment, concentration risk, and recovery rate analysis for small and medium enterprise exposures.

title: Trade Receivables Criteria
description: Criteria for rating securitisations of trade receivables, including dilution analysis, default and delinquency assumptions, and obligor concentration limits.

title: Global Framework for Cash Flow Analysis of Structured Finance Securities
description: Framework governing cash flow modeling approaches across structured finance, including default timing, recovery timing, prepayment assumptions, and liquidity analysis.

title: Global Framework for Payment Structure and Cash Flow Analysis
description: Analysis of payment waterfalls, priority of payments, trigger mechanisms, and structural features in structured finance transactions globally.

title: Principles of Credit Ratings
description: Foundational document outlining S&P's credit rating principles, analytical approach, rating definitions, and governance framework for all rating activities.

title: Methodology for Rating Covered Bonds
description: S&P's approach to rating covered bonds, including assessment of the cover pool, overcollateralisation, asset-liability management, and systemic support analysis.

title: Residential Mortgage-Backed Securitizations Methodology
description: Moody's methodology for rating European RMBS, covering MILAN CE framework, expected loss analysis, mortgage pool stratification, and country-specific adjustments.

title: Moody's Global Approach to Rating Auto Loan- and Lease-Backed ABS
description: Global methodology for auto loan and lease ABS ratings, covering cumulative net loss projections, residual value analysis, and structural features assessment.

title: Equipment Lease and Loan Securitizations Methodology
description: Methodology for rating securitisations backed by equipment leases and loans, including residual value risk, obligor diversity, and equipment depreciation analysis.

title: Trade Receivables-Backed Securitizations Methodology
description: Approach to rating trade receivable securitisations, including analysis of dilution, default rates, seller/servicer risk, and portfolio composition.

title: SME Asset-Backed Securitizations Methodology
description: Methodology for rating ABS backed by SME loan portfolios, addressing granularity, industry concentration, recovery assumptions, and correlation within SME pools.

title: Floorplan Securitizations Methodology
description: Methodology for rating floorplan securitisations (dealer inventory financing), covering dealer credit quality, manufacturer support, and inventory turnover analysis.

title: Structured Finance Counterparty Risks Methodology
description: Framework for assessing counterparty risks in structured finance, including account bank, swap provider, and servicer risk evaluation and mitigation requirements.

title: General Principles for Assessing ESG Risks in Structured Finance
description: Principles for incorporating Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) risk factors into structured finance credit analysis and ratings.

title: Moody's Global Approach to Rating Collateralized Loan Obligations
description: Moody's approach to rating CLOs globally, covering CDOROM model, Moody's Idealized Default Rates, recovery assumptions, and structural analysis of CLO waterfalls.

title: European CMBS Methodology
description: Methodology for rating European CMBS transactions, including property-level analysis, refinancing risk, tenant quality assessment, and market value decline assumptions.

title: Credit Card ABS Methodology
description: Moody's approach to rating credit card ABS, covering charge-off rates, payment rates, yield analysis, and trust-level performance metrics.

title: Moody's Approach to Rating Covered Bonds
description: Methodology for rating covered bonds, including expected loss and TPI (Timely Payment Indicator) framework, cover pool analysis, and overcollateralisation assessment.

title: Moody's Approach to Rating Consumer Loan ABS
description: Methodology for rating consumer loan ABS, covering personal loans, point-of-sale financing, and other consumer credit securitisations.

title: Moody's Approach to Rating ABCP Programs
description: Methodology for rating asset-backed commercial paper programs, including liquidity support analysis, program-wide credit enhancement, and sponsor assessment.

title: Structured Finance and Covered Bonds Country Risk Rating Criteria
description: Fitch's criteria for assessing country risk in structured finance and covered bonds, including sovereign rating caps, country ceiling analysis, and macroeconomic stress scenarios.

title: European Equity Release Loan Products Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for rating securitisations backed by equity release mortgage products (lifetime mortgages), covering longevity risk, property price projections, and no-negative-equity guarantees.

title: European RMBS Rating Criteria
description: Fitch's comprehensive criteria for rating European RMBS, including foreclosure frequency, loss severity, cash flow modeling, and country-specific assumptions for mortgage markets.

title: Global Structured Finance Rating Criteria
description: Fitch's overarching framework for structured finance ratings globally, covering analytical approach, credit enhancement, structural analysis, and rating determination process.

title: Structured Finance and Covered Bonds Interest Rate Stresses Rating Criteria
description: Interest rate stress scenarios applied to structured finance and covered bond ratings, including upward/downward rate shocks and basis risk assumptions across currencies.

title: Consumer ABS Rating Criteria
description: Fitch's criteria for rating consumer ABS including personal loans, student loans, and other consumer receivable securitisations, covering base case and stress assumptions.

title: Structured Finance and Covered Bonds Counterparty Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for assessing and mitigating counterparty risk in structured finance, covering bank account providers, derivative counterparties, and minimum rating thresholds.

title: Asset-Backed Commercial Paper Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for rating ABCP programs and conduits, including liquidity facility analysis, program-wide credit enhancement, and seller/servicer assessment.

title: The Rating Process
description: Description of Fitch's rating process from engagement through surveillance, including committee procedures, information requirements, and rating review triggers.

title: European CLO Rating Criteria
description: Fitch's criteria for rating European CLOs, covering portfolio credit quality assessment using PCM, recovery rate analysis, and structural features of European CLO transactions.

title: European CMBS Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for rating European CMBS transactions, including property-level sustainable cash flow analysis, cap rates, and loan-level default/loss assessment.

title: Auto Loan ABS Rating Criteria
description: Rating criteria for auto loan ABS covering credit analysis of auto loan pools, base case and stress loss assumptions, and structural feature assessment.

title: SME Balance Sheet Securitisation Rating Criteria
description: Criteria for rating balance sheet securitisations of SME loan portfolios, covering default probability assessment, recovery analysis, and portfolio granularity adjustments.

title: Fitch's Approach to Rating Trade Receivable Securitisations
description: Fitch's methodology for rating trade receivable securitisations, including dilution analysis, delinquency and default rates, and servicer quality assessment.

title: Fitch's Approach to Rating Whole Business Securitisations
description: Criteria for rating whole business securitisations (WBS), primarily UK pub/restaurant chains, covering operating company analysis, debt service, and industry risk.

description: DBRS Morningstar's overarching framework document listing and cross-referencing all structured finance related methodologies and their applicability.

description: Methodology for assessing operational risk of originators and servicers in European structured finance, covering underwriting standards, servicing capabilities, and IT systems.

description: Core methodology for rating European structured finance transactions, covering structural analysis, credit enhancement, counterparty risk, and legal framework assessment.
